heading: Tanjil vs Tanjil Bren — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tanjil, Victoria and Tanjil Bren, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tanjil Bren has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Tanjil (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tanjil or Tanjil Bren safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tanjil has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tanjil Bren scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tanjil scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Tanjil Bren scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tanjil or Tanjil Bren?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tanjil Bren has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
